urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Robodebt whistleblower was told her royal commission evidence ‘could cost you your job’, court…
latest.summary: Jeannie-Marie Blake was a key whistleblower in the robodebt scandal, exposing issues with the scheme while still working for the government. She alleges that her department made repeated threats against her before and after her testimony at the royal commission.
latest.details: Jeannie-Marie Blake was a key whistleblower in the robodebt scandal, exposing issues with the scheme while still working for the government. She alleges that her department made repeated threats against her before and after her testimony at the royal commission. Blake was the only current Services Australia employee to give voluntary testimony, which was crucial to the investigation. She has expressed that the trauma from the scheme has left her battling severe mental health issues.
latest.full_brief: Jeannie-Marie Blake was a key whistleblower in the robodebt scandal, exposing issues with the scheme while still working for the government. She alleges that her department made repeated threats against her before and after her testimony at the royal commission. Blake was the only current Services Australia employee to give voluntary testimony, which was crucial to the investigation. She has expressed that the trauma from the scheme has left her battling severe mental health issues.

latest.title: Olympic cyclist admits to driving despite ban after crash that killed wife
latest.summary: Rohan Dennis, an Australian Olympic cyclist, has pleaded guilty to driving while disqualified after a crash that killed his wife. He was previously sentenced to a suspended jail term for creating a likelihood of harm in a separate incident.
latest.details: Rohan Dennis, an Australian Olympic cyclist, has pleaded guilty to driving while disqualified after a crash that killed his wife. He was previously sentenced to a suspended jail term for creating a likelihood of harm in a separate incident. The court found him reckless but not criminally responsible for his wife's death. Prosecutors are seeking to refer his case to the District Court for further action regarding his driving ban.
latest.full_brief: Rohan Dennis, an Australian Olympic cyclist, has pleaded guilty to driving while disqualified after a crash that killed his wife. He was previously sentenced to a suspended jail term for creating a likelihood of harm in a separate incident. The court found him reckless but not criminally responsible for his wife's death. Prosecutors are seeking to refer his case to the District Court for further action regarding his driving ban.

latest.title: NASA Welcomes Mauritius as 70th Artemis Accords Signatory
latest.summary: The Republic of Mauritius has officially joined the Artemis Accords, becoming the seventh African country to do so. NASA's Deputy Administrator Matt Anderson welcomed Mauritius during a signing ceremony in Ébène.
latest.details: The Republic of Mauritius has officially joined the Artemis Accords, becoming the seventh African country to do so. NASA's Deputy Administrator Matt Anderson welcomed Mauritius during a signing ceremony in Ébène. The Permanent Secretary of Mauritius signed the accords, emphasizing the country's commitment to responsible space governance. NASA's engagement with Mauritius dates back to its global mapping efforts between 1965 and 1980.
latest.full_brief: The Republic of Mauritius has officially joined the Artemis Accords, becoming the seventh African country to do so. NASA's Deputy Administrator Matt Anderson welcomed Mauritius during a signing ceremony in Ébène. The Permanent Secretary of Mauritius signed the accords, emphasizing the country's commitment to responsible space governance. NASA's engagement with Mauritius dates back to its global mapping efforts between 1965 and 1980.

latest.title: Trump alleges China meddled in 2020 election and questions voting security ahead of midterms
latest.summary: Trump made unsubstantiated claims about voter fraud and foreign interference in the 2020 election during a speech from the White House. He alleged that China had acquired 220 million voter files and attempted to sway the election in favor of Joe Biden.
latest.details: Trump made unsubstantiated claims about voter fraud and foreign interference in the 2020 election during a speech from the White House. He alleged that China had acquired 220 million voter files and attempted to sway the election in favor of Joe Biden. The US intelligence community has previously concluded that China did not interfere in the election. In response, China's foreign ministry denied the allegations, calling them entirely fabricated.
latest.full_brief: Trump made unsubstantiated claims about voter fraud and foreign interference in the 2020 election during a speech from the White House. He alleged that China had acquired 220 million voter files and attempted to sway the election in favor of Joe Biden. The US intelligence community has previously concluded that China did not interfere in the election. In response, China's foreign ministry denied the allegations, calling them entirely fabricated.

latest.title: Weather tracker: Thunderstorms strike across Europe amid record heatwave
latest.summary: Thunderstorms have struck across Europe amid a record heatwave, causing severe weather conditions. Hailstones the size of golf balls were reported in parts of France, leading to damage to vehicles and buildings.
latest.details: Thunderstorms have struck across Europe amid a record heatwave, causing severe weather conditions. Hailstones the size of golf balls were reported in parts of France, leading to damage to vehicles and buildings. Localized flooding occurred in cities like Wrocław, Poland, where roads and tram tracks were closed. In Bangladesh, monsoon rains have resulted in at least 53 fatalities and significant flooding.
latest.full_brief: Thunderstorms have struck across Europe amid a record heatwave, causing severe weather conditions. Hailstones the size of golf balls were reported in parts of France, leading to damage to vehicles and buildings. Localized flooding occurred in cities like Wrocław, Poland, where roads and tram tracks were closed. In Bangladesh, monsoon rains have resulted in at least 53 fatalities and significant flooding.

latest.title: Japan relaxes royal succession rules - but ban on female emperors remains
latest.summary: The Japanese parliament has approved a bill to relax imperial succession rules. This bill allows the adoption of distant male relatives and enables women to retain their royal status after marrying outside the family.
latest.details: The Japanese parliament has approved a bill to relax imperial succession rules. This bill allows the adoption of distant male relatives and enables women to retain their royal status after marrying outside the family. However, the law barring women from ascending the throne remains unchanged. The bill marks the first amendment to the Imperial House Law since 1949.
latest.full_brief: The Japanese parliament has approved a bill to relax imperial succession rules. This bill allows the adoption of distant male relatives and enables women to retain their royal status after marrying outside the family. However, the law barring women from ascending the throne remains unchanged. The bill marks the first amendment to the Imperial House Law since 1949.

latest.title: Burnham's 'Manchesterism' got him to No 10 - but will it work for the UK?
latest.summary: Andy Burnham has ambitious plans for Manchester, including a bid to host the women's football World Cup in 2035. He aims to collaborate with other mayors for a 'Great Northern' Olympic bid.
latest.details: Andy Burnham has ambitious plans for Manchester, including a bid to host the women's football World Cup in 2035. He aims to collaborate with other mayors for a 'Great Northern' Olympic bid. Burnham's approach is seen as a potential model for national transformation in the UK. Manchester's economic growth has been attributed to a blend of free markets and social initiatives.
latest.full_brief: Andy Burnham has ambitious plans for Manchester, including a bid to host the women's football World Cup in 2035. He aims to collaborate with other mayors for a 'Great Northern' Olympic bid. Burnham's approach is seen as a potential model for national transformation in the UK. Manchester's economic growth has been attributed to a blend of free markets and social initiatives.

latest.title: Samsung’s redesigned Z Fold 8 with a wide display just leaked
latest.summary: Leaker Evan Blass has shared images of Samsung's redesigned Galaxy Z Fold 8 ahead of its official launch event. The leaked images indicate that the device will feature a shorter, wider design and include a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite For Galaxy processor.
latest.details: Leaker Evan Blass has shared images of Samsung's redesigned Galaxy Z Fold 8 ahead of its official launch event. The leaked images indicate that the device will feature a shorter, wider design and include a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite For Galaxy processor. The Galaxy Z Fold 8 is expected to have impressive camera specifications, including dual 50MP rear cameras. Additionally, the Galaxy Z Flip 8 and Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra were also included in the leak.
latest.full_brief: Leaker Evan Blass has shared images of Samsung's redesigned Galaxy Z Fold 8 ahead of its official launch event. The leaked images indicate that the device will feature a shorter, wider design and include a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite For Galaxy processor. The Galaxy Z Fold 8 is expected to have impressive camera specifications, including dual 50MP rear cameras. Additionally, the Galaxy Z Flip 8 and Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra were also included in the leak.

latest.title: Peter Falconio murder: British expert says he has identified a ‘most likely’ burial location
latest.summary: A British expert has identified a potential burial location for Peter Falconio, who was murdered in 2001. The location is an abandoned racetrack situated only 8 kilometers from where Falconio was attacked.
latest.details: A British expert has identified a potential burial location for Peter Falconio, who was murdered in 2001. The location is an abandoned racetrack situated only 8 kilometers from where Falconio was attacked. Bradley John Murdoch, who was convicted of Falconio's murder, never disclosed the location of the body before his death in prison last year. The search for Falconio's remains has been ongoing for decades, with authorities relying on Murdoch's knowledge of the area.
latest.full_brief: A British expert has identified a potential burial location for Peter Falconio, who was murdered in 2001. The location is an abandoned racetrack situated only 8 kilometers from where Falconio was attacked. Bradley John Murdoch, who was convicted of Falconio's murder, never disclosed the location of the body before his death in prison last year. The search for Falconio's remains has been ongoing for decades, with authorities relying on Murdoch's knowledge of the area.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
